creator: void@f-m.fm
text:
On a -current vm snapshot main-n260538-6f52f8504814: Sat Feb  4 23:07:22 UTC 2023 (amd64), the problem occurs in a different place, when pkg gets called for installation of a dependency.

here, for dns/unbound, when devel/pkgconf gets called by the build:

###
install  -m 0644  libpkgconf/bsdstubs.h libpkgconf/iter.h libpkgconf/libpkgconf.h libpkgconf/stdinc.h libpkgconf/libpkgconf-api.h '/usr/ports/devel/pkgconf/work/stage/usr/local/include/pkgconf/libpkgconf'
 /bin/mkdir -p '/usr/ports/devel/pkgconf/work/stage/usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig'
 install  -m 0644 libpkgconf.pc '/usr/ports/devel/pkgconf/work/stage/usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig'
/bin/ln -sf pkgconf /usr/ports/devel/pkgconf/work/stage/usr/local/bin/pkg-config
====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
===>  Installing for pkgconf-1.8.1,1
===>  Checking if pkgconf is already installed
ld-elf.so.1: /usr/local/lib/pkg//provides.so: Undefined symbol "pkg_plugin_set"
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[3]: stopped in /usr/ports/devel/pkgconf
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[2]: stopped in /usr/ports/devel/pkgconf
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/dns/unbound
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/dns/unbound
###
